prerequisites.name: bun
prerequisites.purpose: JavaScript runtime and package manager used by every script and the installer itself.

prerequisites.name: git
prerequisites.purpose: Required to clone the template and track your project's history.

prerequisites.name: node >= 18
prerequisites.purpose: Used by the npx wrapper that runs create-agentic-qa. Must be v18 or newer.

prerequisites.name: gh (GitHub CLI)
prerequisites.purpose: Optional. Needed only if you want the installer to auto-create a GitHub repo (Phase 4 Step 9).

prerequisites.name: internet access
prerequisites.purpose: The scaffolder downloads the boilerplate template from GitHub and gentle-ai skills from their registries.

prerequisites.name: disk space (200 MB+)
prerequisites.purpose: The template, node_modules, and installed skills require at least 200 MB of free disk space.

prerequisites.name: API keys (.env)
prerequisites.purpose: MCP servers (Tavily, Atlassian, DBHub, OpenAPI, Playwright, Postman) require API keys set in .env before they can connect.
prerequisites.installHint: See .env.example in the project root after scaffolding.

items.name: playwright-cli
items.purpose: Browser automation CLI — screenshots, traces, video, session management, request mocking.

items.name: playwright-best-practices
items.purpose: Playwright reference patterns — flaky-test fixes, POM, accessibility (axe-core), auth/OAuth fixtures, perf budgets, i18n, component testing.

items.name: skill-creator
items.purpose: Create, modify, and evaluate Claude Code skills.

items.name: github-actions-docs
items.purpose: GitHub Actions documentation and workflow patterns.

items.name: bun
items.purpose: Bun runtime reference — installation, scripts, package management, testing.

mcps.name: context7
mcps.purpose: Library documentation MCP — fetches official current docs for any library.

mcps.name: tavily
mcps.purpose: Web search MCP — used by skills that need fresh community / docs lookups.

mcps.name: playwright
mcps.purpose: Playwright MCP — browser automation and DOM inspection for E2E test exploration.

mcps.name: dbhub
mcps.purpose: DBHub MCP — direct DB queries and schema introspection for test data validation.

mcps.name: openapi
mcps.purpose: OpenAPI MCP — explore API endpoints and contract testing from the agent.

mcps.name: postman
mcps.purpose: Postman MCP — API collection management and request testing.

envFiles.what: Created from .env.example. Stores all API keys and secrets (gitignored).
direnv autoload file — loads .env into the shell on cd (optional, offered interactively).
Already committed. Uses ${VAR} placeholders — installer ensures .env has the values.
Already committed. Uses {env:VAR} placeholders — installer ensures .env has the values.
Installer idempotency state (gitignored). Tracks which steps completed.

auth.method: One-time interactive login — credentials stored in ~/.config/acli/
Env vars read at MCP startup — no interactive login needed
Env-var driven — credentials read at command invocation. Only required when TMS_PROVIDER=xray.

postInstallSteps.what: Runs bun run scripts/agents-setup.ts — wires .agents/project.yaml with project name, key, and URLs.
Runs acli login — authenticates the Atlassian CLI for Jira/Confluence operations.
Fetches custom field metadata from Jira and writes .agents/jira-fields.json.
Fetches workflow transitions from Jira and writes .agents/jira-workflows.json.
Validates the Jira setup manifest against the fetched field catalog.
Runs bun run api:sync — fetches OpenAPI spec from the configured backend and regenerates api/schemas/ TypeScript types.
Runs bun xray auth login — authenticates against Xray Cloud. Only when TMS_PROVIDER=xray; skipped for Jira-native (Modality jira-native).

willNotInstall.name: bun
willNotInstall.reason: Must be installed manually using your OS package manager.

willNotInstall.name: gh
willNotInstall.reason: Must be installed manually using your OS package manager.

willNotInstall.name: acli
willNotInstall.reason: Must be installed manually using your OS package manager.

willNotInstall.name: playwright-cli
willNotInstall.reason: Must be installed manually. Run: bun add -g @playwright/cli@latest

willNotInstall.name: jq
willNotInstall.reason: Must be installed manually using your OS package manager.

willNotInstall.name: resend
willNotInstall.reason: Must be installed manually using your OS package manager.
